It is a large-cap. Recent news: price target cut, underperformance, institutional buying. Likely classification: growth, healthcare, large_cap.

- ABBV: AbbVie. Pharmaceutical company. It is a large-cap healthcare. News: stock drop, neuroscience franchise. So classification: growth, healthcare, large_cap. Not particularly; pharma is not rate-sensitive, maybe not. So we can assign: growth, healthcare, large_cap.
